project.title: siguecruzroja
project.one_liner: Laravel web platform for student onboarding, course delivery, and related administrative workflows.
project.description: This repository is a Laravel 6 application with Blade views, Vue-enhanced interactions, and a documented API surface. Checked-in routes and source files cover student registration, enrollment requests, course packages, topics, videos, resources, assignments, chats, documents, and payment-related workflows.

prerequisites: A configured database connection (the default Laravel connection is MySQL)
setup_steps: Create a local Laravel environment file manually; this repository does not include .env.example

cv_bullets.bullet: Built a Laravel 6 monolith that combines server-rendered Blade views, REST-style API endpoints, and a Vue-powered frontend asset pipeline.
cv_bullets.notes: Framework, routing, and asset-build evidence are explicit in the checked-in manifests and source files.

cv_bullets.bullet: Implemented student-facing learning flows for course packages, topics, videos, exams, assignments, and progress tracking.
cv_bullets.notes: The route map and API docs explicitly cover these flows.

cv_bullets.bullet: Exposed a documented API surface with LaRecipe/Larecipe-Swagger covering students, enrollment, schedules, videos, resources, chats, charges, and tasks.
cv_bullets.notes: Documentation tooling and versioned markdown docs are checked in.

cv_bullets.bullet: Integrated third-party services for OAuth login, Vimeo video retrieval, Google Classroom access, and payment/webhook processing.
cv_bullets.notes: The integrations are explicit in dependencies, routes, and controller code.

cv_bullets.bullet: Implemented real-time chat using Laravel broadcasting, Echo, Pusher, private channels, and Vue components.
cv_bullets.notes: Frontend listeners, a broadcast event, and channel authorization are all present.

cv_bullets.bullet: Modeled and evolved a large relational schema with extensive Laravel migrations and seeders.
cv_bullets.notes: The repository contains many timestamped migrations spanning multiple feature areas.

cv_bullets.bullet: Added back-office CRUD interfaces with DataTables-backed listings for subjects, schedules, packages, videos, resources, and students.
cv_bullets.notes: The behavior is inferred from route names, controller names, and DataTables-based view code rather than a dedicated product overview document.

cv_bullets.bullet: Supported spreadsheet-based student imports through Maatwebsite Excel.
cv_bullets.notes: Excel dependency, import class, and upload route are all present in the repository.

cv_bullets.bullet: Kept PHPUnit unit and feature test scaffolding plus StyleCI formatting rules in the repository.
cv_bullets.notes: Quality tooling exists, although the checked-in tests are currently minimal.

red_flags.issue: A committed .env file is present, but .env.example is missing even though composer.json references it during setup.
red_flags.notes: Do not publish or reuse committed environment values; create a clean environment template before public distribution.

red_flags.issue: Hard-coded third-party credentials or callback settings are committed in application code and config.
red_flags.notes: Move service keys, secrets, callback URLs, and realtime configuration into environment-driven settings before deploying or publishing.

red_flags.issue: The checked-in test suite appears to be limited to the default example unit and feature tests.
red_flags.notes: PHPUnit is configured, but the repository evidence shows very light automated test coverage.

red_flags.issue: Google Classroom integration depends on local credential files that are not templated or documented in the repository.
red_flags.notes: The controller expects credential and token files under storage/app, which implies an undocumented manual setup step.
